summary: Iteration 23 - Language Simplification + Tone Refinement Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Welcome page shows 'Il tuo commercialista digitale. Sempre al tuo fianco.' headline, (2) Carousel slides about accountant model working ('Prepara tutto per te', 'Ti guida passo dopo passo', etc.), (3) 'Come funziona' section explains delegation model, (4) Practice detail understanding gate shows 'COSA FARA HERION PER TE' with Herion/Tu labels distinguishing responsibilities, (5) 'ENTE DI DESTINAZIONE' section with 'L'invio ufficiale va fatto da te' note, (6) Guidance cards show messaging labels ('RICHIEDE LA TUA AZIONE'), (7) Agent logs section code has 'Cosa ha fatto Herion' header with 'Preparato da Herion' badge (verified in code), (8) Support page FAQs include 'Cosa fa Herion esattamente?' and 'Devo inviare io la pratica?' questions, (9) Backend chat system prompt includes 'commercialista digitale' framing, (10) Backend admin orchestration prompt instructs not to use ## markdown headers. All backend API tests passed (8/8).
critical_code_review_comments: Welcome page hero headline correctly shows 'Il tuo commercialista digitale. Sempre al tuo fianco.'
Carousel slides correctly explain accountant model: 'Prepara tutto per te', 'Ti guida passo dopo passo', 'Distingue il suo lavoro dal tuo', 'Ti ricorda le scadenze', 'Non sostituisce, accompagna'
'Come funziona' section correctly explains delegation model with 'commercialista digitale' framing
Understanding gate (UnderstandingGate component) correctly shows 'COSA FARA HERION PER TE' section with Herion/Tu labels
Understanding gate shows 'ENTE DI DESTINAZIONE' with channel info and 'L'invio ufficiale va fatto da te' note when auto_submission is false
GuidanceCard component correctly shows messaging labels: 'Richiede la tua azione', 'Preparato da Herion', 'Passaggio ufficiale esterno', 'In attesa risposta ufficiale', 'Herion sta lavorando'
Agent logs section (lines 544-583) correctly shows 'Cosa ha fatto Herion' header with 'Preparato da Herion' badge when agent_logs exist
Support page FAQs correctly include new questions about Herion's role and user responsibilities
Backend chat system prompt (line 5522) correctly uses 'commercialista digitale' framing and delegation awareness
Backend admin orchestration prompt (line 1286) correctly instructs 'no ## o **' markdown headers
seed_data_creation: Created test practice 'TEST_Understanding_Gate_Client_2' for understanding gate verification, also created 'TEST_V23_Language_Client' via API test (both cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 tested language simplification and tone refinement features. Key features verified: (1) Welcome page: 'Il tuo commercialista digitale. Sempre al tuo fianco.' headline, carousel with accountant-model slides, 'Come funziona' section. (2) Practice detail understanding gate: 'COSA FARA HERION PER TE' section with Herion/Tu labels showing who does what, 'ENTE DI DESTINAZIONE' section with channel info. (3) Guidance cards: messaging labels like 'RICHIEDE LA TUA AZIONE', 'Preparato da Herion', etc. (4) Agent logs section: 'Cosa ha fatto Herion' header with 'Preparato da Herion' badge (only shows when agent_logs exist). (5) Support page: FAQs about 'Cosa fa Herion esattamente?' and 'Devo inviare io la pratica?'. (6) Backend prompts: chat system prompt uses 'commercialista digitale' framing, admin orchestration prompt instructs no ## markdown headers. All tests passed.
